title: Envelope
description: Contains the properties of an envelope.

envelopeId.description: The unique identifier of the envelope.

envelopeUri.description: The URI for retrieving the envelope.

statusChangedDateTime.description: The date and time the status last changed.

emailSubject.description: The subject line of the envelope email.

emailBlurb.description: The body text of the envelope email.

createdDateTime.description: The date and time the envelope was created.

sentDateTime.description: The date and time the envelope was sent.

deliveredDateTime.description: The date and time the envelope was delivered.

completedDateTime.description: The date and time the envelope was completed.

voidedDateTime.description: The date and time the envelope was voided.

voidedReason.description: The reason the envelope was voided.

declinedDateTime.description: The date and time the envelope was declined.

brandId.description: The ID of the brand applied to the envelope.

certificateUri.description: URI for retrieving the certificate of completion.

isSignatureProviderEnvelope.description: Whether this envelope uses a signature provider.

signingLocation.description: The signing location. Valid values are inPerson and online.

expireEnabled.description: Whether the envelope expiration is enabled.

expireDateTime.description: The date and time the envelope expires.

expireAfter.description: Number of days after which the envelope expires.

autoNavigation.description: Whether auto-navigation is enabled for recipients.
